title: Kendrick Lamar - GNX - Reviews - Album of The Year
text: Album of the Year aggregates reviews for Kendrick Lamar's GNX. The album received widespread critical acclaim from music critics. GNX is the sixth studio album by American rapper Kendrick Lamar, surprise-released on November 22, 2024, through PGLang and Interscope Records. The album's title references a 1987 Buick Grand National Experimental (GNX), a high-spec version of the model that his father used to take him home from the hospital following his birth. Critical Reception: GNX received widespread critical acclaim with Metacritic showing universal acclaim based on a weighted average score of 87 out of 100 from 22 critic scores. At 44 minutes, GNX is at once diverse, homogeneous, expansive, and concise—funny and deadly serious. Key Themes: Lamar takes his victory lap ahead of his 2025 Super Bowl Halftime Show performance, but all with the purpose of uplifting the next generation of LA hip-hop. The project specifically takes a new angle on how his music impacts the community. Commercial Success: GNX debuted atop the Billboard 200 with 319,000 album-equivalent units, marking Lamar's fifth consecutive number-one album. All 12 songs from GNX debuted on the Billboard Hot 100 chart.
